items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: Gemma 4 now runs 2x faster with MTP GGUFs! Run locally on just 6GB RAM. ⚡️ MTP enables Google Gemma 4 run ~1.4–2.2× faster with no accuracy loss. Gemma 4 12B MTP can run at 162 t/s vs. 52 t/s without MTP.

items.summary: Gemma 4 now runs 2x faster with MTP GGUFs! Run locally on just 6GB RAM. ⚡️ MTP enables Google Gemma 4 run ~1.4–2.2× faster with no accuracy loss. Gemma 4 12B MTP can run at 162 t/s vs. 52 t/s without MTP.

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Congrats to @GoogleDeepMind on DiffusionGemma 🎉 A 26B diffusion language model on the Gemma4 backbone, and the first dLLM natively supported in vLLM. It denoises 256-token blocks in parallel instead of generating one token at a time: 1200+ output tok/s at batch size 1 on a single H200 (FP8).

items.summary: Congrats to @GoogleDeepMind on DiffusionGemma 🎉 A 26B diffusion language model on the Gemma4 backbone, and the first dLLM natively supported in vLLM. It denoises 256-token blocks in parallel instead of generating one token at a time: 1200+ output tok/s at batch size 1 on a single H200 (FP8).

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Parallax is a parametrized form of Local Linear Attention that drops the numerical solvers and matches FA 2/3 on decode. The most impressive part is that the architecture's benefit works with Muon but disappears under AdamW because the model learns to suppress it.
items.title: Parallax is a parametrized form of Local Linear Attention that drops the numerical solvers and match…
items.whyItMatters: 新注意力机制Parallax优化解码效率
items.summary: Parallax is a parametrized form of Local Linear Attention that drops the numerical solvers and matches FA 2/3 on decode. The most impressive part is that the architecture's benefit works with Muon but disappears under AdamW because the model learns to suppress it.

roundup.title: Agent Labs Double Down on Secure Deployment
roundup.subtitle: Cloudflare Mastercard支付集成、OpenAI收购Ona、Cursor审查升级
headline: @gdb 与 @OpenAINewsroom 宣布收购 @ona_hq，其安全云执行技术将帮助 Codex 处理长时间任务并支持企业级 Agent 安全部署。@Cloudflare 同时与 @Mastercard 合作推出 Agent Pay，允许 AI Agent 自主完成全球支付。
@cursor_ai 宣布 Auto-review 默认开启，分类子代理准确率达 97%，另一次更新使代码审查速度提升 3 倍、成本降低 22%。@claudeai 同步发布 Claude Code 动态工作流 GA，支持子代理并行执行。
@perplexity_ai 将 Deep Research 集成进 Computer 代理框架，实现搜索即代码生成与长时沙箱并行。@cognition 开源 /handoff 插件，让本地编码代理可无缝交给云端 Devin 继续运行。
@willccbb 指出 NYC 新兴职位 Principal Agent Engineer 已成现实，反映企业对 Agent 工程能力的需求激增。

deepDives.title: DiffusionGemma 发布：26B 扩散语言模型
deepDives.summary: GoogleDeepMind 发布基于 Gemma4 的 26B 扩散文本模型，支持 Apache 2.0 开源，推理速度显著提升并被 vLLM 原生支持。

facts.text: DiffusionGemma 是首个被 vLLM 原生支持的扩散语言模型，可并行去噪 256-token 块。
facts.quote: It denoises 256-token blocks in parallel instead of generating one to

facts.text: 模型在单张 H200 上可达 1200+ output tok/s，本地运行最低 18GB RAM。

bullish.text: DiffusionGemma 推理速度极快，适合本地实验

deepDives.title: OpenAI 收购 Ona 强化企业 Agent 安全
deepDives.summary: OpenAI 收购 @ona_hq 以获得安全云执行技术，助力 Codex 长时间运行并帮助更多组织安全部署生产级 Agent。

facts.text: Ona 的安全云执行技术将让 Codex 在笔记本合盖后仍能继续工作。
facts.quote: Its secure cloud execution technology will help Codex take on longer-running work, even when laptops are closed

bullish.text: Ona 加入将极大提升企业 Agent 部署安全性

bullets.text: Cursor Auto-review 子代理准确率 97%，Bugbot 速度提升 3 倍
GitHub Copilot App 技术预览向所有付费用户开放，无需等待名单
Gemma 4 MTP GGUFs 使本地 6GB RAM 运行速度提升 2 倍
bullets.quote: Gemma 4 12B MTP can run at 162 t/s vs. 52 t/s without MTP

bullets.text: Untied Ulysses 突破单节点 8xH100 的长上下文训练内存墙

talentMoves.text: OpenAI 收购 @ona_hq 以强化企业级 Agent 安全部署能力

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Auto-review 默认开启，子代理审查准确率 97%
topTweets.whyItMatters: Agentic code review 成为默认体验

topTweets.author: @cognition
topTweets.text: 开源 /handoff 插件，支持云端 Devin 持续运行
topTweets.whyItMatters: Agent 工作流可跨设备无缝延续

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: vLLM 原生支持 DiffusionGemma，单 H200 达 1200+ tok/s
topTweets.whyItMatters: 扩散模型首次进入主流推理框架

takeaways: Agent 安全部署与支付基础设施正快速成熟，企业级采用门槛降低。
扩散模型与 vLLM 集成带来 4 倍以上推理加速，本地实验成本显著下降。
编码 Agent 的子代理审查与动态工作流已进入生产可用阶段，值得立即评估。
